product_name: Men's Printed Cotton Kurta - Royal Blue
title: Excellent quality kurta
body: Absolutely loved this kurta. The fabric is super soft and the print is vibrant. Fits perfectly as per size chart. Will buy more colors.

title: Size mismatch and poor quality
body: Ordered medium but received small. The embroidery was barely visible and threads were hanging everywhere. Returned immediately. Do not buy!

title: Complete waste of money
body: One earbud stopped working in 3 days. The claimed 30 hour battery life is false — it died in 2 hours. The ANC is basically non-existent. Total fraud listing!

title: Accurate and easy to use
body: Very accurate kitchen scale. Tare function works perfectly. Compact design. LCD display is bright. Good value for money. Using it daily.

title: Best running shoes under 2000
body: Incredibly comfortable and lightweight. The cushioning is excellent. Great grip on all surfaces. Runs true to size. Highly recommend for jogging.

title: Spam listing — terrible product
body: This listing has the worst title I have ever seen. The product itself is cheap synthetic fabric that makes you sweat. Nothing like the description. Avoid.

title: Lost 12kg in one week!!!
body: Amazing product. I lost 12kg in just one week. Totally genuine and no side effects. Everyone should buy this. 5 star!
flag_reason: Suspected fake review — impossible health claims

title: Miracle product!
body: Changed my life in 7 days! Lost 8kg without diet or exercise. Doctor confirmed the results. Buy immediately!

title: NOT GENUINE APPLE PRODUCT
body: This is NOT an original Apple charger. The packaging looks fake, the cable quality is terrible. My phone kept disconnecting. Reported this seller.

title: Good value but handle gets hot
body: Good non-stick coating and easy to clean. Only issue is the handles get warm during cooking. Otherwise great set for the price.

title: Sole came off after 1 day
body: My son wore these shoes once to school and the sole started detaching from the upper. Quality is absolutely terrible. Returned immediately. Very unsafe for kids.

title: Absolutely stunning saree
body: This is the most beautiful saree I have ever ordered online. The zari work is exquisite and the fabric is genuine silk. Perfect for my daughter's wedding. Will definitely order more.

title: Missing many advertised features
body: The listing claims SpO2, GPS and ECG but the watch only has basic step counting. Heart rate is wildly inaccurate. The AMOLED display is actually a basic LCD. Very misleading listing.

title: Game changer for healthy cooking
body: This air fryer has transformed my cooking. Food comes out perfectly crispy with minimal oil. The 8 preset modes are very convenient. Easy to clean non-stick basket. Worth every rupee!

title: Terrible quality — fabric is see-through
body: Ordered medium but received large. The fabric is thin and transparent — completely unwearable without a slip underneath. The stitching is already coming apart. Waste of money.

product_name: Men's Printed Cotton Kurta - Royal Blue
title: Fabric quality is not as shown
body: The photos show rich cotton fabric but what I received is thin poly-cotton blend. The color is also not the same vibrant blue as shown. Disappointing.

title: Beautiful dress, slight size issue
body: Love the floral pattern and fabric. Very comfortable to wear. Only issue was the waist runs slightly small. Overall good purchase and seller packed it nicely.

title: Leaking from the base — defective
body: Received a defective kettle that leaks from the base seal. Very dangerous — electric kettle should not leak water. Returned immediately. Check for leaks before using.

title: Perfect fit and very clear
body: Applied easily with the included guide. Crystal clear with no rainbow effect. Touch sensitivity is not affected at all. Great protection for the price.

product_name: Heavy Duty Steel Dumbbell Set - 10kg Pair
title: Solid build quality — exactly as described
body: These dumbbells are exactly as described. Solid heavy steel with good knurling on the grip. The rubber ends protect the floor. Great addition to my home gym.

title: Bass distortion ruins the experience
body: Setup was easy but the sound quality is poor. Heavy bass distortion makes music sound muddy. No proper ANC despite the claim. Expected much better for the price.

product_name: Copper Bottom Brass Idol Ganesh - 6 inch
title: Truly exquisite craftsmanship
body: This is a beautiful piece of art. The detail in the brass work is stunning. Makes a perfect addition to our home temple. The copper base gives it an authentic look. Very satisfied.

title: Completely destroyed during shipping
body: Received the sandal with the heel completely broken. It was poorly packaged with no bubble wrap. The material inside the box was just a thin plastic bag. Total waste.

title: Policy violation — making false claims
body: This product claims to 'boost immunity in 3 days' which is medically impossible. Also claiming FDA approval which I strongly doubt. Please flag this listing for investigation.
flag_reason: Misleading medical claims — possible policy violation

title: Colors faded completely on first wash
body: Followed the washing instructions but the bright colors faded dramatically after just one wash. The print is now dull and washed out. Not as durable as described.

title: Good mat, slight odor initially
body: Excellent grip and good thickness. Lightweight enough to carry around. Has a slight chemical smell initially but went away after airing for 2 days. Good value overall.

title: Electric shocks — DANGEROUS product
body: This device gave me strong electric shocks beyond normal EMS levels. Had to rip it off my neck. My skin was red for 2 days. This product is dangerous and should be recalled.

title: Good quality formal shirt
body: Nice crisp white shirt. Good fabric blend. Fits well according to size chart. The collar stays stiff even after washing. Good for office wear. Will purchase again.

title: Embroidery falling apart
body: The embroidery started coming off within 24 hours of receiving the package. Threads are hanging loose everywhere. Very poor craftsmanship. Feels like it will disintegrate in first wash.

title: Smooth and precise — gaming-grade quality
body: Excellent gaming mouse. The 2400 DPI sensor is very accurate with no jitter. RGB lighting is beautiful. The 50 hour battery claim is actually accurate — been using for 3 weeks on same charge.
